mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO model_usage_detail (user_id, model_name, session_id, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, reasoning_tokens, cached_tokens, cost, create_time) VALUES
(#{usageDetail.userId}, #{usageDetail.modelName}, #{usageDetail.sessionId}, #{usageDetail.promptTokens}, #{usageDetail.completionTokens}, #{usageDetail.totalTokens}, #{usageDetail.reasoningTokens}, #{usageDetail.cachedTokens}, #{usageDetail.cost}, #{usageDetail.createTime})
